pr.title: Medusa: Unstable — DeltaNet Crawler 0.8104 BPB 10mb file size(best seed), mean 0.9984, Frugendorff continuation

output.summary: Combines Frugendorff crawler loops with 4-head DeltaNet chunk_delta_rule, loop-aware GPTQ, and late-start EMA for int6-frugal training.
techniques: Frugendorff crawler topology with 4 flat + 1 crawler loops
Canonical DeltaNet chunk_delta_rule via 4 heads and short_conv
Loop-aware 2-phase GPTQ plus late-start EMA reinitialization
